DARV.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: So many things here. So many shiny stones.
Hah! Looks like even gems can't light up your eyes! Come on, pick one!
You don't seem to want anything… Well, take your time. I'm in no rush.
I've got thousands of gems here, but not one seems to make you stop…

Fine, let me just grab one at random then.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno casually picks up an unremarkable stone.[/font_size][/i]
Ha ha ha! You just picked the best one I've got!
NEOW.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: Awake again. We're doing this again…
If you're offering me something… no. You can't give me what I want.

[sine]…Go then… 
..To the top… or the bottom… ..we'll… meet again…[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_C: Such a gorgeous room. You're so dazzling. I have nothing… but I need nothing…
Oh my, even with nothing, you'd shine if I just gave you a little light.
Your desire for nothing is rather interesting. Let me dress you up a little.
Even if you want nothing, you should at least look presentable.

You probably don't have it… but suit yourself.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno stands still, like a hollow statue that someone forgot to paint.[/font_size][/i]
Tch, what a charmless girl. Take it — this is the last bit of warmth I've got.
OROBAS.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHAR: You jump so high. Are you dancing for someone?
Here!! I'm the only one here! Fluffy fluffy!
What do you want? I've got lots of good stuff!!
You came from another world? Cool cool! What's it like there?
(Tells them a little about her world.)
So many fun things! The tiny person knows so much! Good! Good!! These are my gift to you!
PAEL.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: Your snoring is so steady. Like the last regular thing left in this world.
[thinky_dots]Your heart is even quieter than mine… Take it, a gift for the silent…[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Those who don't fight and don't take often go the furthest… Unless you never meant to go anywhere?[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]My flesh won't rush you… It'll just sit here spacing out with you…[/thinky_dots]

…Pain, sleep, waking. They're all about the same, really.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno's voice is very soft, as if speaking about something that doesn't concern her.[/font_size][/i]
[thinky_dots]Take it… so you can keep sitting here… watching the tides come and go. Without ever getting your feet wet…[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: You want to fight. I refuse.
[b]Your blood is still warm! If you're alive, show me a swing![/b]

If you want to fight, then fight.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno lowers her blade toward the ground, as if casually setting a battle aside.[/font_size][/i]
[b]Take it. This sword is your trophy. Face forward! Don't look back![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_C: The fire is warm. But I have nothing that needs warming.
You can still warm your hands even without anything. Come in, let me [jitter][b]warm[/b][/jitter] you up to pass the time.
You're so empty — did you pack up your [jitter][b]feelings[/b][/jitter] and mail them away too?
Try this [jitter][b]snack[/b][/jitter]. The kind you don't have to rush through.

…Taste. Whether it's there or not, it's the same. But since you offered.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno takes it and bites off just one piece.[/font_size][/i]
What an interesting child. Then hold onto it — and wait for it to slowly [jitter][b]cool[/b][/jitter] down.
VAKUU.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARA: Demons make deals too. My soul… take it if you want.
A [sine]soul[/sine] that's barely been used… always fetches the highest price…
Not even interested in bargaining? That [sine]empty[/sine] attitude — it's utterly fascinating.
If a contract had just one word on it — [sine]"nothing"[/sine] — would you sign?

"Nothing" is a good word. It carries more weight than my name. I'll sign.
[i][font_size=22]Her signature is light as an inkless pen, leaving an invisible scratch on the paper.[/font_size][/i]
Fascinating! I've never seen someone sign [sine]nothingness[/sine] with such conviction. Take it — payment for your emptiness.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YU: You don't belong here. Why have you come to see me?
Tell me how to get home.
Home? Impossible. I have no reason to tell you.
Still haven't given up? I only act to maintain order.
The Spire remembers you. You've come so many times — such tenacity. How many more will it take?
